LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGMENT CREDITOR FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND ORDER RESTRAINING JUDGMENT DEBTOR TOM BENSON IS GRANTED IN PART. NO OPPOSITION. THE PORTION OF THE MOTION SEEKING AN ORDER REQUIRING THE INSURANCE COMPANIES TO ASSIGN COMPENSATION DUE TO MR. BENSON TO THE CREDIT UNION IS DENIED BECAUSE THIS COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER THE INSURANCE COMPANIES. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor Tom Benson Aka Benson Tom; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Jennifer A. Smith, Tel. No. 1-213-891-0700 appearing for the
Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
No other appearance on this matter.

RULING - The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment creditor Farmers Insurance Group Federal Credit Union's motion for assignment order and order restraining judgment debtor Tom Benson is granted in part. No opposition. The portion of the motion seeking an order requiring the Insurance Companies to assign compensation due to Mr. Benson to the Credit Union is denied because this court lacks jurisdiction over the Insurance Companies. Moving party to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Valerie Bantner Peo, Esq. of Buchalter, Tel. 415.222.0900, appearing for plaintiff/moving party;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Plaintiff stipulates that the matter can be heard by Judge Pro Tem Thomas A. Cohen.

Ruling - There being no other appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Plaintiff Farmers Insurance Group Federal Credit Union's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Request For Sanctions as follows: The Motion is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $586 plus $60 filing fee for a total of $646. Order signed. (See order filed this date for details.)

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT/HEK)
